title: Barcelona Crosswind Final
subtitle: LFML 31R · 4 NM short final on 3° path · A330
description: All scenario values (position, IAS, aircraft, gear/flaps, weather) come from this JSON. A minimal .FLT is generated at start — no hand-maintained flight file required. Spawn is on extended centerline ~4 NM from threshold at elev+dist×318 ft (nominal 3°).
hudTips: Start free flight in A330-200 (RR) first — Challenge Lab will not hot-swap aircraft.
Start Challenge sets spawn, noon local time, weather, and gear safely.
Edit spawn / timeOfDay / weather in this JSON, then restart the challenge.
